name.description: A descriptive name for this rule

tags.description: List of tags to apply if the match criteria are met

match.description: Criteria required for this rule to match a transaction

payee_name.description: Regex pattern to match against the payee name

notes.description: Regex pattern to match against transaction notes

account_name.description: Regex pattern to match against the account name

payee_any.description: List of regex patterns; matches if ANY pattern matches the payee name

account_any.description: List of regex patterns; matches if ANY pattern matches the account name

category_name.description: Regex pattern to match against the category name

category_any.description: List of regex patterns; matches if ANY pattern matches the category name

notes_any.description: List of regex patterns; matches if ANY pattern matches the notes
